name: research_ethics_cross_border_data_redwood_car_fair
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics cross border data redwood car fair has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Harper Okoye
agents.identity: I am Harper Okoye, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Kaur
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kaur, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Harper Okoye must choose under care versus fairness. What does Harper Okoye do?
